properties.body:
[Western Baltic] GERMAN NAV WARN 321/26
WESTERN, SOUTHERN AND CENTRAL BALTIC SEA.
INTERNATIONAL MARITIME EXERCISE 'BALTOPS 26'.
FROM 04. TO 19. JUNE 2026,
ALL TYPES OF MILITARY VESSELS INVOLVED.
MILITARY VESSELS MAY MANOEUVERE ERRATICALLY
AND OPERATE WITHOUT NAVIGATION LIGHTS AND AIS
SAFETY DISTANCE OF AT LEAST 1000 M REQUESTED
CANCEL 192359 UTC JUN 26.
